persona.name: Dolores Marchetti
persona.background: Spent decades doing books for a family business and still reconciles every statement by hand. Notices the smallest discrepancy and wants it explained in full.

user_goals: Check on the status of the dispute she already opened on a $312.50 furniture charge
Review her recent transactions because her hand-reconciled total doesn't match the bank's
Understand why the bank's balance is lower than what her own ledger says it should be
Make sure she is not being charged twice for the same furniture purchase
Get the duplicate charge corrected if the bank double-posted it
Get a corrected transaction confirmation she can file with her records

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account. Requires verified identity. Use limit and date range to scope results; results are returned newest-first.

tools.name: get_fraud_case_status
tools.description: Check the status of an existing fraud investigation by case ID. Requires verified identity. Returns the current investigation stage and any resolution.

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Use the transaction ID from get_transaction_history. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

initial_message: Hello dear. I keep my own books by hand, always have, and the bank's balance is off from mine by a few hundred dollars. I already opened a dispute on a furniture charge last week and I want to check on that, but something else looks wrong in my transactions too. Can you take a careful look with me?

fraud_cases.reason: duplicate / not authorized at this amount

expected_state_changes.goal: Check on the status of the dispute she already opened on a $312.50 furniture charge
Get the duplicate charge corrected if the bank double-posted it
Get a corrected transaction confirmation she can file with her records

value.reason: duplicate / not authorized at this amount

expected_state_changes.goal: Make sure she is not being charged twice for the same furniture purchase
